---
title: "Teaching"
---

### Course Instructor

##### Faculty of Information, University of Toronto

-   INF2167 – R for Data Science (Summer 2026)
    -   [Course description](https://ischool.utoronto.ca/course/r-for-data-science/)
    -   [Course repository](https://github.com/InessaDeAngelis/INF2167)

### Teaching Assistant

##### Faculty of Information, University of Toronto

-   INF1001 – Introduction to Critical Information Policy Studies (Fall 2024, 2025)
-   INF1339 – Introduction to Computational Thinking (Fall 2024)

##### Department of Political Science, University of Toronto

-   POL319 – Elections and Voting (Fall 2025)
-   POL382 – Topics in Canadian Politics (Political Representation) (Winter 2026)
